---
name: Boundary Review
description: Request review of a Boundary Test artifact or fixture.
title: "Boundary review: "
labels: ["boundary-review"]
---

## Review Target

Link or name the artifact, fixture, or document to review.

## Review Question

What boundary question should be examined?

Examples:

- Does this artifact inherit authority from another artifact?
- Does this comparison imply interoperability?
- Are the claims and non-claims clear enough for independent review?

## Expected Review Posture

Select one:

- [ ] REVIEW-ONLY
- [ ] PASS boundary check
- [ ] FAIL boundary check
- [ ] INCOMPLETE

## Non-Claims Confirmation

Confirm that this issue does not claim:

- [ ] GLM conformance
- [ ] GLM compatibility
- [ ] GLM adoption
- [ ] GLM endorsement
- [ ] runtime interoperability
- [ ] delegated authority
- [ ] execution authority
- [ ] consequence authority

## Notes

Add any context needed for review without relying on private discussion.
